heading: Establishment of Commission
label: 70702 Establishment of Commission

L. 115–10, § 838(1)Subsec. (c). , added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 115–10, § 838(2)

children.text: the International Space Station or its operational viability;

children.label: A
children.text: owned by the Federal Government; or

children.label: B
children.text: being used pursuant to a contract or Space Act Agreement with the Federal Government for carrying a government astronaut or a researcher funded by the Federal Government; or
a crew member or passenger of any space vehicle described in this subsection.

children.heading: .—Deadline for Establishment
children.label: b .—Deadline for Establishment
children.text: The President shall establish a Commission within 7 days after an incident specified in subsection (a).

children.heading: .—Government astronaut
children.label: 1 .—Government astronaut
children.text: The term “government astronaut” has the meaning given the term in section 50902.

children.heading: .—Space act agreement
children.label: 2 .—Space act agreement
children.text: The term “Space Act Agreement” means an agreement entered into by the Administration pursuant to its other transactions authority under section 20113(e).
